creator: stefan.baehring@astuteq.de
text:
Hello, could you please publish the following text on your website for commercial FreeBSD Hosting? Many thanks in advance! Stefan Baehring
BeastieCLOUD
BeastieCLOUD offers high quality FreeBSD hosting solutions in german speaking territories (D-A-CH). We provide individual server configurations to match any demand of our customers. "Good isn't good enough if there is a way to do it better!"
